item.title: Safety of Venous Thromboembolism Pharmacological Prophylaxis in Hospitalized Patients With Inflammatory Bowel Disease (VISCOUS Study).
item.description: Journal of patient safety - Hospitalization secondary to inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) exacerbation is a significant risk factor for venous thromboembolism (VTE). Guidelines recommend the use of thromboprophylaxis; however...
